name: Greek3
description: Изучение и практика современного греческого языка

scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/test-srs-pick.mjs && node scripts/test-db-backup.mjs && node scripts/test-learning-ladder.mjs && node scripts/test-match-step.mjs && node scripts/test-spell-step.mjs && node scripts/test-ru-choice-labels.mjs
